title: Generalize data size calculation
description: Data size calculation is currently hardcoded for GAIA only.
rationale: Needs understanding of other potential modes beyond GAIA.

title: Fix struct representation
description: FuBnrDpModuleNumber should be repr(u4) and AuxCommand struct needs adjustment.
rationale: Affects binary data layout, critical for protocol correctness.

title: Refactor AuxStatus enum
description: Remove FuBnrDpAuxStatusFlags enum and restructure AuxStatus.

title: Prevent FD leaks in Polkit agent
description: Close all FDs to avoid leaking them to the agent.
rationale: Standard practice for spawning processes but requires careful implementation.

title: Move JCat import logic to libjcat
description: Refactor JCat stream import logic to the libjcat library.
rationale: Involves changing an external library (libjcat).

title: Handle zero data request properly
description: Currently aborts when data_sz == 0, needs proper handling.
rationale: Aborting is harsh, but correct recovery needs protocol knowledge.

title: Prevent infinite loop in data write
description: Potential infinite loop in do...while if device requests wrong data repeatedly.
rationale: Can be fixed by adding a counter/limit.
